title: Enterprise features release dates from 2022 to 2023

posts.author: Mikki (Mikki)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to see a list of enterprise features (ONLY FOR ENTERPRISE-NOT OTHER ACCOUNTS) and see their release dates ,particularly for 2022 and onwards

I’ve received the following links and they haven’t been helpful:

  1. https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360021358419-The-features-available-on-your-Enterprise-account

  2. https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/9883737292946-Release-notes-2023

  3. https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/4417777325586-Release-notes-2022

Link 1 doesn’t cover all things in enterprise. Link 2 shows release dates but only for 2023, and only ONE enterprise enterprise feature. Link 3 is for 2022 but only shows 4 features. Could this be?
